description: Draws an annotation line between two endpoints with optional styling. Endpoints are resolved from point references (at() expressions) and supports color, style, dash, and fadeout styling.
utility: Annotate diagrams with styled lines between specified points

arguments.name: from
arguments.description: Starting point for the annotation line, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: to
arguments.description: Ending point for the annotation line, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

alternates.syntax: annotationline(at(r1, c1), at(r2, c2), c(blue), s(solid))
alternates.description: Line with blue color and solid style

examples.scenario: Horizontal separator between x-intercept and y-intercept calculations (axis intercepts lesson)
Separator line between coefficient calculations with timing (diameter through center lesson)
Section divider line with teal color
